heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly sunny, except mostly cloudy in the in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley, with the chance late-day showers there. Highs from the mid 60s to around 70. Southeast winds 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming cloudy. Showers likely in New York, with a rising chance elsewhere, mainly after on midnight, and a chance late northeast  Lows in the low to mid 40s east of the Greens, mid to upper 40s west. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Cloudy. Rain likely, then diminishing to showers in the afternoon, except a steadier rain continuing northeast. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming northwest late.
